name: Coconut Shrimp Surprise
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Leeks or onion (s), thinly sliced
1/2 cup Coconut milk (or light coconut milk) -or- evaporated skim milk with coconut extract (optional)
1 1/4 pounds Rock shrimp or 1 1/2 pounds Medium shrimp, shelled and deveined
4 cups Cooked basmati rice or long-grain rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place frozen shrimp directly into the sauce and simmer on medium heat, covered, until they just turn opaque, about 4-5 minutes depending on the size of the shrimp.
2. Heat oil in a large heavy skillet over medium heat. Add leeks and saute until softened, 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add tomatoes and their juice, orange juice concentrate, lemon juice, dried mint (fresh mint added later), chile paste, salt, and pepper. Cook the sauce uncovered until slightly thickened, about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in coconut milk with fresh mint and cook for 2 minutes.
5. Add shrimp, cover, and cook until they just turn opaque, about 2-4 minutes; the shrimp will continue to cook on standing, so avoid overcooking.
6. Spoon rice into individual bowls and ladle shrimp and sauce on top.
